title: Ultra Realistic Black White Cinematic Portrait Uploaded
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Black White Cinematic Portrait Uploaded
prompt:
Ultra-realistic black-and-white cinematic portrait of the uploaded character reference image, identity preserved exactly. Subject standing outdoors under an overcast white sky background, photographed from a slightly low-angle fashion photography perspective. The man has a sharp masculine jawline, pale skin tone, realistic skin texture, short modern haircut, subtle facial hair, and an intense confident expression.

Subject wearing a luxury black overcoat layered over a black turtleneck sweater, styled like a high-end editorial fashion campaign. A thick cigar is naturally placed in the mouth with realistic smoke texture and authentic cigar details. Pose should feel candid and effortless, not posed like a selfie.

The composition should feel like a luxury magazine cover or designer campaign. Minimal white background with soft blurred tree branches or subtle environmental elements in the distance. High contrast monochrome aesthetic while keeping natural skin texture and avoiding overprocessed HDR look.

Camera style:

low-angle fashion portrait
telephoto lens compression
shallow depth of field
soft cinematic lighting
realistic grayscale tones
natural shadows
documentary-style realism
luxury editorial composition
subtle film grain
ultra detailed
4K fashion photography realism
Keep facial structure, hairstyle, skin texture, proportions, and overall identity identical to the uploaded character reference image.

Include:

luxury wrist watch
black leather gloves (optional)
subtle chain necklace (optional)
realistic cigar ash and smoke
clean white sky background
soft blurry trees in background
fashion magazine framing
authentic monochrome tones
Text overlay requirement:
Large bold text saying “HIPE” in black behind the subject’s head or at the bottom of the frame. Text should feel integrated naturally into the composition like a premium campaign poster.

The image should feel like a real luxury fashion editorial shot captured by a professional photographer for a designer campaign. Ultra-realistic, masculine, cinematic, timeless, minimal, powerful aesthetic.
